message:
chore(db): update database manifest with new hash and format

Updates the phage.db.manifest.json to reflect the current database state
with improved formatting for readability.

Changes:
- Update hash from a6a5f66f... to 6ca7e1b9... reflecting database rebuild
- Change version from string "1.0.0" to integer 1 (simpler versioning)
- Reduce size from 1449984 to 1445888 bytes (~4KB smaller)
- Add human-readable sizeFormatted field: "1.4 MB"
- Add generatedAt timestamp for cache invalidation tracking
- Format JSON with proper indentation for git diff readability
- Remove tables array (redundant with schema introspection)

The manifest is used by the web application to verify database integrity
and determine when to refetch from CDN after updates.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
